scripts.test: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc --module commonjs --target es2020 --outDir .test-dist lib/trip/types.ts lib/trip/parse-file.ts && node --test --test-isolation=none tests/parse-file.test.mjs tests/trip-refactor.test.mjs tests/trip-component-dom.test.mjs
